title: Limited-edition Trump portrait passport explained
shortDescription: The State Department plans a limited Trump portrait passport for Americas 250th anniversary. Here is where it will be available and when.

title: Artemis II astronauts meet Trump as NASA plans more moon missions
shortDescription: President Donald Trump welcomed the Artemis II astronauts Wednesday, April 29, to the White House, where he praised their mission around the moon.

title: Trump signals Iran blockade could last months as costs of war surge: Live updates
shortDescription: Increasing prices as a result of the war are expected to cost American households thousands of dollars. Trump says he’s holding out for Iran to disavow their nuclear program.

title: King Charles charmed Trump. Is it enough to mend US-UK relations?
shortDescription: King Charles III has won praise for his deft diplomacy and dealings with President Donald Trump in his visit to the United States. Is it enough?

title: Trump says UFO files will include 'a lot of things'
shortDescription: Speaking at a White House event with NASA's Artemis II mission crew, President Donald Trump said that UFO files will contain "a lot of things."

title: Trump says Comey 'probably' put his life in danger with '8647' post
shortDescription: President Trump told reporters that former FBI Director James Comey "probably" endangered his life with his "8647" seashell post.

title: Trump gives update on UFO files
shortDescription: President Trump said his administration plans to release information and materials relating to UFOs.

title: ¿Habrá acción militar en Cuba? Senado republicano mantiene poder de Trump
shortDescription: El Senado Republicano bloquea limitar el poder de Trump sobre Cuba, manteniendo abierta la posibilidad de acción militar sin aprobación del Congreso.

title: Florida lawmakers pass DeSantis map that could add 4 GOP House seats
shortDescription: Florida's Republican-controlled Legislature backed Gov. Ron DeSantis plan to redraw congressional districts to add four likely GOP seats.

title: Trump reacts to SCOTUS limiting Voting Rights Act
shortDescription: The Congressional Black Caucus is sounding the alarm on the Supreme Court's "legitimacy" after its decision on a Louisiana Congressional map.

title: Usha Vance, expecting 4th child, attends White House royal visit
shortDescription: Second lady Usha Vance greeted British royals during their White House visit among other American leaders.

title: Next stop SCOTUS? Trump loses appeal of $83.3 million Carroll verdict
shortDescription: President Donald Trump lost another appeal in his ongoing battle against paying New York writer E. Jean Carroll an $83.3 million defamation judgment.

title: Artemis II astronauts meet President Trump at White House
shortDescription: President Trump met the four Artemis II astronauts at the White House nearly three weeks after their landmark mission around the moon.

title: Supreme Court weighs Trump's bid to end deportation protections
shortDescription: The Supreme Court seemed open to President Trump’s attempt to end deportation protections for Syrians and Haitians in oral arguments.

title: King Charles III gifts Trump a 'Trump' bell. See its long history
shortDescription: King Charles III gifted President Donald Trump a historic brass bell during the April 28 state dinner. Here's the bell's long history.

title: Trump jokes about his marriage not lasting as long as his parents'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump joked that his marriage with Melania Trump would not last as long as his parents' marriage. How long have they been married?

title: Supreme Court sides against Black voters
shortDescription: The Supreme Court struck down a Louisiana congressional map that may limit the power of the 1965 Voting Rights act.
